name: Cervical Spine CT
description: Cervical spine CT for trauma and bony evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the cervical spine without contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Vertebral Bodies
sections.content: Cervical vertebral bodies [show normal alignment / no compression fracture / no bony lesion]. Vertebral body heights are preserved.

sections.name: Intervertebral Discs
sections.content: Disc spaces are [preserved / normal height / no herniation].

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: Spinal canal is [patent / no stenosis / no mass effect on cord].

sections.name: Posterior Elements
sections.content: Pedicles, laminae, and spinous processes [are intact / no fracture / no dislocation].

impression:
1. No acute cervical spine fracture.
2. Normal alignment.
3. No acute finding.
